CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Utilization_End_Date__c), ISBLANK(leaseworks__Last_Snapshot_Date__c ) ), NULL, DATE(1900, 01, 01) + MAX( BLANKVALUE( leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Utilization_End_Date__c, DATE(1900, 01, 01) ) - DATE(1900, 01, 01), BLANKVALUE( leaseworks__Last_Snapshot_Date__c , DATE(1900, 01, 01) ) - DATE(1900, 01, 01) ) )
CustomField.label: Last TSN/CSN Update Date
